sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28973" key="dusepi/bolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσεπί-βολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28973.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to assail</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χώρα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> codd.; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">risky to undertake</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πλοῦς</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Peripl. M.Rubr.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unsuccessful</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">N.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
